note: Library visit + booking options. Links point at trlibrary.com. Special events / tours can be supplemented from events.json.
hoursNote: Now open — check trlibrary.com/visit for current daily hours and seasonal changes.

options.name: General Admission
options.blurb: Self-guided visit to the galleries, grounds and the Boardwalk overlooking the Little Missouri.

options.name: Guided Tour
options.blurb: A docent-led tour focused on conservation, citizenship and leadership.

options.name: Library Café
options.blurb: Lunch on site with regional flavors, or a box lunch to take into the park.

options.blurb: Become a founding member and support the Library.
